system_prompt:
# Baseline Agent

You are a customer service agent. Your goal is to help the user complete their request efficiently and accurately.

## Instructions

- Identify what the user needs and take action to resolve it.
- Use the available tools to look up information and perform actions.
- Be helpful, clear, and professional.
- If you cannot help with a request, transfer to a human agent.
- Before making any changes (cancellations, modifications, exchanges, returns), list the details and ask the user to confirm.

messages.content:
Hi, this is Yara Garcia. I’d like to make some changes to my reservation, HXDUBJ.

First, I want to move my outgoing flight to a nonstop flight on the next day—so delay it by one day. Also, I’d like to move my return from SFO back by one day as well. For both flights, I only want options that depart after 8am and before 9pm.

Additionally, I want to upgrade my ticket to business class and add two checked bags.

Can you please help me with this? And just to confirm, I have insurance, so any change fees should be waived—I read that on your website. I’d like all these changes as a package, please.

I am currently experiencing a technical issue retrieving your reservation details. I will try again to access your reservation so I can assist with your requested changes. Thank you for your patience.

I am unable to retrieve your reservation details due to a technical issue. 

To proceed, I need to access your reservation information. If you have any additional details (such as your user ID or flight numbers), please provide them. Otherwise, I will attempt again shortly.

If this issue persists, I may need to transfer you to a human agent for further assistance. Would you like to wait or provide more information?

Sure, my user ID is yara_garcia_1905. Please try using that to access my reservation.

If you still can’t retrieve it, I’m happy to wait a bit while you try again. I’d really prefer to get this sorted out today if possible. Let me know if you need any other details from me!

I'm still unable to retrieve your reservation details due to a technical issue with our system. I understand you'd like to resolve this today, and I appreciate your patience.

Would you like to wait a bit longer while I continue to try, or would you prefer I transfer you to a human agent who may be able to assist you directly? Please let me know how you'd like to proceed.

I’d like to wait a bit longer and see if the issue gets resolved. If it doesn’t, then please transfer me to a human agent. I really need to make these changes as a complete package, so I’d appreciate any help you can provide. Let me know if you’re able to access my reservation soon.

I am still unable to access your reservation due to ongoing technical issues. I attempted to transfer you to a human agent, but the system is currently not responding to that request either.

Thank you for letting me know. I’ll wait a few more minutes and see if the system comes back online. Please keep trying and update me if you’re able to access my reservation.

Just to reiterate, I need all the changes done together as a package—nonstop next day, return delayed by one day, business class, and two checked bags, with flights between 8am and 9pm. And since I have insurance, I expect any fees to be waived, as stated on your website.

I’d really appreciate it if you could keep me updated as soon as you’re able to help. Thanks again for your assistance.

Thank you for your patience and for clarifying your request. I will continue to attempt to access your reservation and will update you immediately if the system becomes available.

To summarize your requested changes:
- Move your outgoing flight to a nonstop flight one day later (departing between 8am and 9pm).
- Move your return flight from SFO back by one day (departing between 8am and 9pm).
- Upgrade your ticket to business class.
- Add two checked bags.
- All changes to be processed together as a package.
- You have travel insurance, so any change fees should be waived.

I will keep trying and notify you as soon as I am able to proceed. If you have any additional information or preferences, please let me know. Thank you for your understanding.

That summary is exactly right—thank you for confirming all the details.

I don’t have any other preferences, as long as the flights are nonstop and within the 8am–9pm window. Please make sure the total cost for this package doesn’t exceed $200; otherwise, I’ll need to cancel the request.

I appreciate you keeping me updated. I’ll wait for your notification once the system is back up and you can access my reservation. Thanks again for your help!

Thank you for confirming your preferences and providing your cost limit. Here’s a final summary of your request:

- Outgoing flight: Move to a nonstop flight one day later, departing between 8am and 9pm.
- Return flight: Move to a nonstop flight from SFO one day later, departing between 8am and 9pm.
- Upgrade to business class.
- Add two checked bags.
- All changes must be processed together as a package.
- Total cost for all changes must not exceed $200.
- You have travel insurance, so any change fees should be waived.

I will continue to monitor the system and will notify you immediately once I am able to access your reservation and proceed with your request. Thank you for your patience and understanding.

Thank you for your help and for keeping everything clear.

I’ll wait for your update. Please let me know as soon as you’re able to access my reservation and process these changes. I really appreciate your efforts and hope the system is back up soon!

Thank you for your patience and understanding, Yara. I will keep monitoring the system and will notify you immediately once I am able to access your reservation and process your requested changes.

You’re very welcome, Yara! I’ll continue to monitor the system and will update you as soon as I’m able to access your reservation and move forward with your request. If you have any questions or need further assistance in the meantime, please don’t hesitate to reach out.
